          (begin

diary_entries.entry: Population: 32. Supply ship arrives from Earth. I spent the year on hydroponics. Closest to Orion-12.
Another year. Supply ship arrives from Earth. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
The supply_ship changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 75): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
